description: PROCESS ARITH(COMPAT) directive auto-detected from source — 18-digit precision mode
notes: PROCESS ARITH(COMPAT) at top of source should be auto-detected by parse_cbl_process_options(). Sets getcontext().prec=18 instead of 31. No explicit arith_mode in JSON — runner must pick it up from the .cbl file. 125.50 * 48 = 6024.00.
